features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You prepare a fixed number of spells from your spellbook (starting with 4 at level 1). Intelligence is your spellcasting ability. You can use your spellbook as a spellcasting focus.

features.name: Ritual Adept
features.description: You can cast any spell in your spellbook as a ritual, even if it isn't prepared, provided the spell has the ritual tag.

features.name: Arcane Recovery
features.description: Once per day when you finish a Short Rest, you can choose expended spell slots to recover. The spell slots can have a combined level that is equal to or less than half your wizard level (rounded up).

features.name: Scholar
features.description: You gain Expertise in one of the following skills in which you are proficient: Arcana, History, Investigation, Medicine, Nature, or Religion.

features.name: Wizard Subclass
features.description: You choose your Arcane Tradition subclass. You gain features at levels 3, 6, 10, and 14.

features.name: Savant
features.description: When you choose your subclass, you gain two free spells of that school of magic. Each time you gain a new level of spell slots, you gain another free spell of that school.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You can increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1, or take a feat.

features.name: Memorize Spell
features.description: Whenever you finish a Short Rest, you can choose one of the spells you have prepared and replace it with another spell from your spellbook.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen subclass.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You can increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1, or take a feat.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen subclass.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You can increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1, or take a feat.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen subclass.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You can increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1, or take a feat.

features.name: Spell Mastery
features.description: Choose a 1st-level spell and a 2nd-level spell in your spellbook. You can cast those spells at their lowest level without expending a spell slot when you have them prepared.

features.name: Epic Boon
features.description: You gain an Epic Boon feat of your choice.

features.name: Signature Spells
features.description: Choose two 3rd-level spells in your spellbook as your signature spells. You always have them prepared, and you can cast each of them once at 3rd level without expending a spell slot.
